title: Unmarried
writer: Grover Jones, William Slavens McNutt, Lillie Hayward
actors: Helen Twelvetrees, Buck Jones, Donald O'Connor
plot: When his manager, Pins Streaver, is killed attempting to rob a safe after losing all his money betting on a fight, third-rate fighter Slag Bailey leaves New York to investigate Streaver's property in upstate New York. Accompanied ...
